name: Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銀河眼の雲篭</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギャラクシーアイズ・クラウドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Galaxy-Eyes" monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon". You can only use this effect of "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon" once per turn. If this card is in the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Galaxy-Eyes" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as an Xyz Material. You can only use this effect of "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Galaxy-Eyes" monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon". You can only use this effect of "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon" once per turn. You can only use this effect of "Galaxy-Eyes Cloudragon" once per Duel.

action: Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
